title: PhoneSpecification
description: Normalized smartphone specification data used to render the infographic comparison.

id.description: Canonical slug identifier, e.g. galaxy-s26-ultra or iphone-17-pro-max.

brand.description: Manufacturer name, e.g. Samsung or Apple.

model.description: Consumer-facing model name, e.g. Galaxy S26 Ultra or iPhone 17 Pro Max.

technology.description: Panel technology, e.g. Dynamic AMOLED 2X or Super Retina XDR OLED.

chipset.description: SoC name, e.g. Snapdragon 8 Gen 4 or A18 Pro.

cpu.description: CPU configuration, e.g. Octa-core (1x3.8 GHz + 3x3.0 GHz + 4x2.0 GHz).

gpu.description: GPU name, e.g. Adreno 760 or Apple GPU (6-core).

ram.description: RAM capacity for base variant, e.g. 12GB.

storage.description: Internal storage for base variant, e.g. 256GB.

rear.description: Rear camera setup description, e.g. 200MP wide + 50MP ultrawide + 50MP telephoto.

front.description: Front camera description, e.g. 12MP with autofocus.

charging.description: Wired and wireless charging speeds, e.g. 45W wired, 25W wireless.

os.description: Operating system, e.g. Android 15 with One UI 7 or iOS 19.

dimensions.description: Physical dimensions, e.g. 162.8 x 77.6 x 8.2 mm.

fetchedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the data was fetched.
